summary.business_type: Local real estate / property developer (eco villas for sale, near Green School Bali) — small marketing site, 11 pages, Astro SSR
top_findings: Google Analytics is silently broken in production: the CSP blocks the inline gtag config script, so zero analytics data is being collected
Pinch-to-zoom is disabled sitewide (maximum-scale=1 on the viewport meta tag) — a WCAG 1.4.4 violation
19 of the site's original images (~4.3MB) are still raw JPG; everything added this session was converted to WebP but the original photography never was
LCP is 3.9-4.5s against a 1.8s target, driven directly by the unoptimized original images
Color contrast failure on every page's eyebrow label (text-accent utility class, 3.04:1 vs required 4.5:1) — one shared class, one fix, sitewide impact
quick_wins: Remove maximum-scale=1 from the viewport meta tag
Add a nonce/hash to fix the CSP-blocked Google Analytics script
Darken text-accent color to fix contrast sitewide in one change
Fix llms.txt's stale 'rice field views' to 'village view' for Villa Kailash
Change h4 feature labels to h3 in VillaDetails.tsx to fix heading-order skip

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: robots.txt explicitly welcomes GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended by name
sitemap.xml and llms.txt present and cover all 11 pages
Every page fully server-rendered with unique title/canonical/description
Lighthouse SEO score 100/100 on every page tested

findings.title: Google Analytics blocked by CSP in production
findings.description: The inline gtag('config', ...) script in Layout.astro has no nonce/hash/unsafe-inline allowance in the production CSP set by middleware.ts. Confirmed via browser console CSP violation errors on every page.
findings.recommendation: Add a nonce or hash for this inline script, or restructure GA initialization to avoid an inline block.

findings.title: Pinch-to-zoom disabled sitewide
findings.description: Viewport meta tag includes maximum-scale=1, a WCAG 1.4.4 violation flagged by Lighthouse on every page.

findings.title: llms.txt has a stale fact
findings.description: Still says 'rice field views' for Villa Kailash; the meta description and VillaDetails.tsx were corrected to 'village view' earlier this session but llms.txt was missed.

findings.title: Blog post 2 title tag over budget

categories.name: Performance
what_works: CLS is 0 on every page tested
Static assets correctly cached with content-hashed filenames

findings.title: 19 original images still raw JPG, ~4.3MB total
findings.description: villa-sungai-hero.jpg (321KB), villa-kailash-hero.jpg (185KB), villa-interior.jpg (234KB), villa-kitchen.jpg (179KB), and 15 more predate this session and were never converted to WebP, unlike every image added during this session.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP with resize + compression, following the same process used for all images added this session. Expect 70-85% size reduction based on this session's results.

findings.title: LCP is 3.9-4.5s against a 1.8s target
findings.description: 2.1-2.5x over target on all three pages audited, directly downstream of the unoptimized hero images.
findings.recommendation: Fix via the image conversion above; re-measure after.

findings.title: 840ms-2,140ms of render-blocking time
findings.description: Likely the synchronous Google Fonts stylesheet and/or GTM script tag on the critical rendering path.
findings.recommendation: Investigate preload/async loading strategy for fonts and third-party scripts.

categories.name: Accessibility
what_works: 0 missing/empty alt text across every image checked
Semantic landmarks and lang attribute correct

findings.title: Color contrast failure on eyebrow labels sitewide
findings.description: The text-accent utility class (used for 'PHOTO GALLERY', 'THE LOCATION', 'THE LIFESTYLE', etc. on every page) renders at 3.04:1 against a 4.5:1 requirement.
findings.recommendation: Darken the accent color or increase text size/weight past the large-text 3:1 threshold. One CSS change fixes every instance.

findings.title: Heading hierarchy skips a level on villa pages
findings.description: VillaDetails.tsx goes from h2 straight to h4 for feature labels, with no h3.

findings.title: Footer social links have no accessible name and go nowhere
findings.description: Instagram/Facebook icons use href="#" with no aria-label.
findings.recommendation: Add real profile URLs and aria-labels, or remove until real profiles exist.

categories.name: Content Quality / GEO
what_works: Zero duplicate content found in a full cross-page diff this session
Every page fully crawlable without JavaScript (unlike the live production site)
27+ FAQ pairs across the site, all schema-backed

findings.title: No LocalBusiness/RealEstateAgent schema
findings.description: This is a Bali-based property business; adding this schema type would strengthen local + GEO signals.
findings.recommendation: Add LocalBusiness or RealEstateAgent schema with address/geo/areaServed.

categories.name: Images
what_works: Every image added this session is WebP, compressed, and correctly alt-texted
Lazy-loading correctly scoped to below-the-fold images

findings.title: 19 original images not yet optimized (see Performance)
6 unused images in public/images (~1.2MB)
findings.description: cultural-immersion, green-school-4, jungle-nature, mindful-community, villa-bamboo, villa-pool — none referenced in source.
